verses.latin_vulgate: Ascendit ergo Abram de Ægypto, ipse et uxor ejus, et omnia quæ habebat, et Lot cum eo, ad australem plagam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֩עַל֩ אַבְרָ֨ם מִמִּצְרַ֜יִם ה֠וּא וְאִשְׁתּ֧וֹ וְכׇל־אֲשֶׁר־ל֛וֹ וְל֥וֹט עִמּ֖וֹ הַנֶּֽגְבָּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Abram went up out of Egypt, he and his wife, and all that he had, and Lot with him into the south.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Abram vaelsi ylös Egyptistä emäntänsä ja kaiken kalunsa kanssa, ja Lot hänen kanssansa, etelään päin.
verses.king_james: And Abram went up out of Egypt, he, and his wife, and all that he had, and Lot with him, into the south.

verses.latin_vulgate: Erat autem dives valde in possessione auri et argenti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַבְרָ֖ם כָּבֵ֣ד מְאֹ֑ד בַּמִּקְנֶ֕ה בַּכֶּ֖סֶף וּבַזָּהָֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he was very rich in possession of gold and silver.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Abramilla oli sangen paljo karjaa, hopiaa ja kultaa.
verses.king_james: And Abram was very rich in cattle, in silver, and in gold.

verses.latin_vulgate: Reversusque est per iter, quo venerat, a meridie in Bethel, usque ad locum ubi prius fixerat tabernaculum inter Bethel et Hai,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּ֙לֶךְ֙ לְמַסָּעָ֔יו מִנֶּ֖גֶב וְעַד־בֵּֽית־אֵ֑ל עַד־הַמָּק֗וֹם אֲשֶׁר־הָ֨יָה שָׁ֤ם אׇֽהֳלֹה֙ בַּתְּחִלָּ֔ה בֵּ֥ין בֵּֽית־אֵ֖ל וּבֵ֥ין הָעָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he returned by the way, that he came, from the south to Bethel, to the place where before he had pitched his tent between Bethel and Hai,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän matkusti edespäin etelästä BetEliin asti, hamaan siihen paikkaan, jossa hänen majansa oli ennen ollut, BetElin ja Ain vaiheella:
verses.king_james: And he went on his journeys from the south even to Beth–el, unto the place where his tent had been at the beginning, between Beth–el and Hai;

verses.latin_vulgate: in loco altaris quod fecerat prius : et invocavit ibi nomen Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֶל־מְקוֹם֙ הַמִּזְבֵּ֔חַ אֲשֶׁר־עָ֥שָׂה שָׁ֖ם בָּרִאשֹׁנָ֑ה וַיִּקְרָ֥א שָׁ֛ם אַבְרָ֖ם בְּשֵׁ֥ם יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the place of the altar which he had made before, and there he called upon the name of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Juuri siihen paikkaan, johon hän ennen alttarin oli rakentanut; ja Abram saarnasi siinä Herran nimestä.
verses.king_james: Unto the place of the altar, which he had made there at the first: and there Abram called on the name of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sed et Lot qui erat cum Abram, fuerunt greges ovium, et armenta, et tabernacula.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְגַ֨ם־לְל֔וֹט הַהֹלֵ֖ךְ אֶת־אַבְרָ֑ם הָיָ֥ה צֹאן־וּבָקָ֖ר וְאֹהָלִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: But Lot also, who was with Abram, had flocks of sheep, and herds of beasts, and tents.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Lotilla, joka Abramia seurasi, oli myös lampaita, ja karjaa, ja majoja.
verses.king_james: And Lot also, which went with Abram, had flocks, and herds, and tents.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nec poterat eos capere terra, ut habitarent simul : erat quippe substantia eorum multa, et nequibant habitare communiter.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלֹא־נָשָׂ֥א אֹתָ֛ם הָאָ֖רֶץ לָשֶׁ֣בֶת יַחְדָּ֑ו כִּֽי־הָיָ֤ה רְכוּשָׁם֙ רָ֔ב וְלֹ֥א יָֽכְל֖וּ לָשֶׁ֥בֶת יַחְדָּֽו׃
verses.douay_rheims: Neither was the land able to bear them, that they might dwell together: for their substance was great, and they could not dwell together.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ei heitä vetänyt maa yhdessä asumaan; sillä heillä oli paljo tavaraa, eikä taitaneet yhdessä asua.
verses.king_james: And the land was not able to bear them, that they might dwell together: for their substance was great, so that they could not dwell together.

verses.latin_vulgate: Unde et facta est rixa inter pastores gregum Abram et Lot. Eo autem tempore Chananæus et Pherezæus habitabant in terra illa.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיְהִי־רִ֗יב בֵּ֚ין רֹעֵ֣י מִקְנֵֽה־אַבְרָ֔ם וּבֵ֖ין רֹעֵ֣י מִקְנֵה־ל֑וֹט וְהַֽכְּנַעֲנִי֙ וְהַפְּרִזִּ֔י אָ֖ז יֹשֵׁ֥ב בָּאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Whereupon also there arose a strife between the herdsmen of Abram and of Lot. And at that time the Chanaanite and the Pherezite dwelled in that country.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja riita oli Abramin paimenien ja Lotin paimenien välillä: Ja siihen aikaan asuivat myös Kanaanealaiset ja Pheresiläiset maalla.
verses.king_james: And there was a strife between the herdmen of Abram’s cattle and the herdmen of Lot’s cattle: and the Canaanite and the Perizzite dwelled then in the land.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixit ergo Abram ad Lot : Ne quæso sit jurgium inter me et te, et inter pastores meos et pastores tuos : fratres enim sumus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֨אמֶר אַבְרָ֜ם אֶל־ל֗וֹט אַל־נָ֨א תְהִ֤י מְרִיבָה֙ בֵּינִ֣י וּבֵינֶ֔ךָ וּבֵ֥ין רֹעַ֖י וּבֵ֣ין רֹעֶ֑יךָ כִּֽי־אֲנָשִׁ֥ים אַחִ֖ים אֲנָֽחְנוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Abram therefore said to Lot: Let there be no quarrel, I beseech thee, between me and thee, and between my herdsmen and thy herdsmen: for we are brethren.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Abram sanoi Lotille: älkään olko riita minun ja sinun välilläs, ja minun ja sinun paimentes välillä: sillä me olemme miehet veljekset.
verses.king_james: And Abram said unto Lot, Let there be no strife, I pray thee, between me and thee, and between my herdmen and thy herdmen; for we be brethren.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce universa terra coram te est : recede a me, obsecro : si ad sinistram ieris, ego dexteram tenebo : si tu dexteram elegeris, ego ad sinistram pergam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֲלֹ֤א כׇל־הָאָ֙רֶץ֙ לְפָנֶ֔יךָ הִפָּ֥רֶד נָ֖א מֵעָלָ֑י אִם־הַשְּׂמֹ֣אל וְאֵימִ֔נָה וְאִם־הַיָּמִ֖ין וְאַשְׂמְאִֽילָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Behold the whole land is before thee: depart from me, I pray thee: if thou wilt go to the left hand, I will take the right: if thou choose the right hand, I will pass to the left.
verses.finnish_biblia: Eikö koko maa ole edessäs altis? eroita sinus minusta, jos sinä menet vasemmalle puolelle, minä menen oikialle, eli jos sinä menet oikialle, minä menen vasemmalle.
verses.king_james: Is not the whole land before thee? separate thyself, I pray thee, from me: if thou wilt take the left hand, then I will go to the right; or if thou depart to the right hand, then I will go to the left.

verses.latin_vulgate: Elevatis itaque Lot oculis, vidit omnem circa regionem Jordanis, quæ universa irrigabatur antequam subverteret Dominus Sodomam et Gomorrham, sicut paradisus Domini, et sicut Ægyptus venientibus in Segor.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשָּׂא־ל֣וֹט אֶת־עֵינָ֗יו וַיַּרְא֙ אֶת־כׇּל־כִּכַּ֣ר הַיַּרְדֵּ֔ן כִּ֥י כֻלָּ֖הּ מַשְׁקֶ֑ה לִפְנֵ֣י ׀ שַׁחֵ֣ת יְהֹוָ֗ה אֶת־סְדֹם֙ וְאֶת־עֲמֹרָ֔ה כְּגַן־יְהֹוָה֙ כְּאֶ֣רֶץ מִצְרַ֔יִם בֹּאֲכָ֖ה צֹֽעַר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Lot lifting up his eyes, saw all the country about the Jordan, which was watered throughout, before the Lord destroyed Sodom and Gomorrha, as the paradise of the Lord, and like Egypt as one comes to Segor.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Lot nosti silmänsä, ja katseli kaiken Jordanin lakeuden; sillä se oli vedestä viljainen: ennen kuin Herra Sodoman ja Gomorran hukutti, oli se niinkuin Herran yrttitarha, niinkuin Egyptin maa, siihenasti kuin Zoariin tullaan.
verses.king_james: And Lot lifted up his eyes, and beheld all the plain of Jordan, that it was well watered every where, before the Lord destroyed Sodom and Gomorrah, even as the garden of the Lord, like the land of Egypt, as thou comest unto Zoar.

verses.latin_vulgate: Elegitque sibi Lot regionem circa Jordanem, et recessit ab oriente : divisique sunt alterutrum a fratre suo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּבְחַר־ל֣וֹ ל֗וֹט אֵ֚ת כׇּל־כִּכַּ֣ר הַיַּרְדֵּ֔ן וַיִּסַּ֥ע ל֖וֹט מִקֶּ֑דֶם וַיִּפָּ֣רְד֔וּ אִ֖ישׁ מֵעַ֥ל אָחִֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Lot chose to himself the country about the Jordan, and he departed from the east: and they were separated one brother from the other.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Lot vallitsi itsellensä koko sen lakeuden Jordanin tykönä, ja matkusti itään päin: ja niin veljekset erkanivat toinen toisestansa:
verses.king_james: Then Lot chose him all the plain of Jordan; and Lot journeyed east: and they separated themselves the one from the other.

verses.latin_vulgate: Abram habitavit in terra Chanaan ; Lot vero moratus est in oppidis, quæ erant circa Jordanem, et habitavit in Sodomis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַבְרָ֖ם יָשַׁ֣ב בְּאֶֽרֶץ־כְּנָ֑עַן וְל֗וֹט יָשַׁב֙ בְּעָרֵ֣י הַכִּכָּ֔ר וַיֶּאֱהַ֖ל עַד־סְדֹֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Abram dwelt in the land of Chanaan: and Lot abode in the towns, that were about the Jordan, and dwelt in Sodom.
verses.finnish_biblia: Että Abram asui Kanaanin maalla, ja Lot asui lakeuden kaupungeissa, ja pani majansa Sodoman puoleen.
verses.king_james: Abram dwelled in the land of Canaan, and Lot dwelled in the cities of the plain, and pitched his tent toward Sodom.

verses.latin_vulgate: Homines autem Sodomitæ pessimi erant, et peccatores coram Domino nimis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַנְשֵׁ֣י סְדֹ֔ם רָעִ֖ים וְחַטָּאִ֑ים לַיהֹוָ֖ה מְאֹֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the men of Sodom were very wicked, and sinners before the face of the Lord beyond measure.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Sodoman kansa oli paha, ja rikkoi kovin Herraa vastaan.
verses.king_james: But the men of Sodom were wicked and sinners before the Lord exceedingly.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque Dominus ad Abram, postquam divisus est ab eo Lot : Leva oculos tuos et vide a loco, in quo nunc es, ad aquilonem et meridiem, ad orientem et occidentem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיהֹוָ֞ה אָמַ֣ר אֶל־אַבְרָ֗ם אַחֲרֵי֙ הִפָּֽרֶד־ל֣וֹט מֵֽעִמּ֔וֹ שָׂ֣א נָ֤א עֵינֶ֙יךָ֙ וּרְאֵ֔ה מִן־הַמָּק֖וֹם אֲשֶׁר־אַתָּ֣ה שָׁ֑ם צָפֹ֥נָה וָנֶ֖גְבָּה וָקֵ֥דְמָה וָיָֽמָּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord said to Abram, after Lot was separated from him: Lift up thy eyes, and look from the place wherein thou now art, to the north and to the south, to the east and to the west.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra sanoi Abramille, sitte kuin Lot oli eroittanut itsensä Abramista: nosta nyt silmäs ja katso siitä, kussas asut, pohjan puoleen, etelän puoleen, idän puoleen ja lännen puoleen.
verses.king_james: And the Lord said unto Abram, after that Lot was separated from him, Lift up now thine eyes, and look from the place where thou art northward, and southward, and eastward, and westward:

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnem terram, quam conspicis, tibi dabo, et semini tuo usque in sempiternum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֧י אֶת־כׇּל־הָאָ֛רֶץ אֲשֶׁר־אַתָּ֥ה רֹאֶ֖ה לְךָ֣ אֶתְּנֶ֑נָּה וּֽלְזַרְעֲךָ֖ עַד־עוֹלָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: All the land which thou seest, I will give to thee, and to thy seed for ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä kaiken sen maan, minkä sinä näet, annan minä sinulle, ja sinun siemenelles ijankaikkiseksi.
verses.king_james: For all the land which thou seest, to thee will I give it, and to thy seed for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Faciamque semen tuum sicut pulverem terræ : si quis potest hominum numerare pulverem terræ, semen quoque tuum numerare poterit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשַׂמְתִּ֥י אֶֽת־זַרְעֲךָ֖ כַּעֲפַ֣ר הָאָ֑רֶץ אֲשֶׁ֣ר ׀ אִם־יוּכַ֣ל אִ֗ישׁ לִמְנוֹת֙ אֶת־עֲפַ֣ר הָאָ֔רֶץ גַּֽם־זַרְעֲךָ֖ יִמָּנֶֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I will make thy seed as the dust of the earth: if any man be able to number the dust of the earth, he shall be able to number thy seed also.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja teen sinun siemenes niinkuin tomun maan päällä: että jos joku taita lukea tomun maan päällä, niin hän myös taitaa sinun siemenes lukea.
verses.king_james: And I will make thy seed as the dust of the earth: so that if a man can number the dust of the earth, then shall thy seed also be numbered.

verses.latin_vulgate: Surge, et perambula terram in longitudine et in latitudine sua : quia tibi daturus sum eam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ק֚וּם הִתְהַלֵּ֣ךְ בָּאָ֔רֶץ לְאׇרְכָּ֖הּ וּלְרׇחְבָּ֑הּ כִּ֥י לְךָ֖ אֶתְּנֶֽנָּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Arise and walk through the land in the length, and the breadth thereof: for I will give it to thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nouse ja vaella maata pitkin ja poikin: sillä sinulle minä sen annan.
verses.king_james: Arise, walk through the land in the length of it and in the breadth of it; for I will give it unto thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Movens igitur tabernaculum suum Abram, venit, et habitavit juxta convallem Mambre, quæ est in Hebron : ædificavitque ibi altare Domino.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֶּאֱהַ֣ל אַבְרָ֗ם וַיָּבֹ֛א וַיֵּ֛שֶׁב בְּאֵלֹנֵ֥י מַמְרֵ֖א אֲשֶׁ֣ר בְּחֶבְר֑וֹן וַיִּֽבֶן־שָׁ֥ם מִזְבֵּ֖חַ לַֽיהֹוָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: So Abram removing his tent, came, and dwelt by the vale of Mambre, which is in Hebron: and he built there an altar to the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Abram siirsi majansa, ja tuli, ja asui Mamren lakeudella, joka on Hebronissa: ja rakensi siinä alttarin Herralle.
verses.king_james: Then Abram removed his tent, and came and dwelt in the plain of Mamre, which is in Hebron, and built there an altar unto the Lord.
